title: Webview load reliability & non-loading VSIX regression prevention
description: The sidebar webview has repeatedly stuck on Loading or shipped broken in VSIX form. Capture root causes, document them, and lock in static + npm tests so regressions fail CI/evals.
success_criteria: Runbook lists known failure modes and mitigations (dev/WEBVIEW_NON_LOADING_RUNBOOK.md)
Webview posts ready synchronously after listeners are wired (not only on window load)
Host gates _loadItems on _isWebviewReady and handles ready before _loadItems
Diagnostics: webviewDiag forwarding, session-start log line, dual log paths (workspace + globalStorage)
package.json main points to dist/extension.js; .vscodeignore excludes unpacked extension.js from VSIX
npm test includes extension-test.js (ready → loadItems / noWorkspace integration)
dist/extension.js is not older than extension.js (webview_reliability check)
VSIX build is automated in the loop: vsix_freshness_eval runs npm run package and verifies a fresh *.vsix (or SKIP_VSIX_PACKAGE=1 for dist-only check)
npm run release runs the full improver loop including VSIX step
Code_Improver config includes webview_reliability_eval.py and vsix_freshness_eval.py
notes: See dev/WEBVIEW_NON_LOADING_RUNBOOK.md. Use npm run release before installing a VSIX. Set SKIP_VSIX_PACKAGE=1 to skip packaging in vsix_freshness_eval.
